lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl, First House:
Deluded and confused by doubt, the mortal practices falsehood.
It is said that the Lord was born on the eighth lunar day. ||1||
Setting aside all other days,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਤੇ ਰਹਤ ਨਾਰਾਇਣ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran te rehat naaraaein |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Lord is beyond birth and death. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਜਨਮਿ ਨ ਮਰੈ ਰੇ ਸਾਕਤ ਢੋਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ohu janam na marai re saakat dtor |2|
lines.english: God is not born, and He does not die, you foolish, faithless cynic! ||2||
You prepare sweet treats and feed them to your stone god.
You sing lullabyes to your stone god - this is the source of all your mistakes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਮੁਖੁ ਜਲਉ ਜਿਤੁ ਕਹਹਿ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਜੋਨੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: so mukh jlau jit kaheh tthaakur jonee |3|
lines.english: Let that mouth be burnt, which says that our Lord and Master is subject to birth. ||3||
The God of Nanak is pervading and permeating everywhere. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮਿ ਨ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: janam na marai na aavai na jaae |
lines.english: He is not born, and He does not die; He does not come and go in reincarnation.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
Standing up, I am at peace; sitting down, I am at peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਉ ਨਹੀ ਲਾਗੈ ਜਾਂ ਐਸੇ ਬੁਝੀਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhau nahee laagai jaan aise bujheea |1|
lines.english: I feel no fear, because this is what I understand. ||1||
The One Lord, my Lord and Master, is my Protector.
I sleep without worry, and I awake without worry.
He is the Inner-knower, the Searcher of Hearts. ||1||Pause||
You, O God, are pervading everywhere. ||2||
Says Nanak, the Guru has implanted His Mantra within me. ||3||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਸੁਖਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ghar sukh vasiaa baahar sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: I dwell in peace in my home, and I am at peace outside.
The One Lord, the Lord of the World, is my God Allah.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰਤ ਨ ਰਹਉ ਨ ਮਹ ਰਮਦਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: varat na rhau na meh ramadaanaa |
lines.english: I do not keep fasts, nor do I observe the month of Ramadaan.
I serve only the One, who will protect me in the end. ||1||
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਜ ਕਾਬੈ ਜਾਉ ਨ ਤੀਰਥ ਪੂਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: haj kaabai jaau na teerath poojaa |
lines.english: I do not make pilgrimages to Mecca, nor do I worship at Hindu sacred shrines.
He adminsters justice to both Hindus and Muslims. ||1||Pause||
I serve the One Lord, and not any other. ||2||
I am not a Hindu, nor am I a Muslim.
I have taken the One Formless Lord into my heart; I humbly worship Him there. ||3||
I do not perform Hindu worship services, nor do I offer the Muslim prayers.
My body and breath of life belong to Allah - to Raam - the God of both. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੀਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਖੁਦਿ ਖਸਮੁ ਪਛਾਨਾ ॥੫॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur peer mil khud khasam pachhaanaa |5|3|
lines.english: meeting with the Guru, my Spiritual Teacher, I realize God, my Lord and Master. ||5||3||
Says Kabeer, this is what I say:
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
I easily tied up the deer - the ten sensory organs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਂਚ ਮਿਰਗ ਬੇਧੇ ਸਿਵ ਕੀ ਬਾਨੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: paanch mirag bedhe siv kee baanee |1|
lines.english: I shot five of the desires with the Word of the Lord's Bani. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮ੍ਰਿਗ ਪਕਰੇ ਬਿਨੁ ਘੋਰ ਹਥੀਆਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mrig pakare bin ghor hatheeaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: and we capture the deer without horses or weapons. ||1||Pause||
I go out hunting with the Saints,
My mind used to run around outside hunting.
But now, I have found the game within the home of my body-village. ||2||
I caught the deer and brought them home.
God has given this gift.
Nanak's home is filled with the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੁਖ ਚੁਖ ਲੇ ਗਏ ਬਾਂਢੇ ਬਾਟਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: chukh chukh le ge baandte baatt |3|
lines.english: Dividing them up, I shared them, bit by bit. ||3||
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
Even though he may be fed with hundreds of longings and yearnings,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਚੀਤਿ ਨ ਆਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saakat har har cheet na aaeaa |1|
lines.english: still the faithless cynic does not remember the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||
Take in the teachings of the humble Saints.
Even so, they do not absorb the water; they remain hard and dry. ||2||
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, you shall obtain the supreme status. ||1||Pause||
Stones may be kept under water for a long time.
